company: Smart Alfa Teknoloji San. Ve Tic. A.S.
intended_use: Nerveblox assists qualified healthcare professionals in identifying anatomical structures in the following ultrasound-guided peripheral nerve block regions for use prior to any needle intervention and
intended_use_full: Nerveblox assists qualified healthcare professionals in identifying anatomical structures in the following ultrasound-guided peripheral nerve block regions for use prior to any needle intervention and is used for adult patients 18 years of age or older. It is not used in combination with needles or during needle insertion.
ground_truth: Expert U.S. board-certified anesthesiologists provided manual evaluations of anatomical structure highlighting and image quality assessments
other_metrics: True positive rate: 98%; True negative rate: 90%; False-positive rate: 10.4%; False-negative rate: 2%; Anatomical structure detection accuracy: 97.2% (933 out of 960 scans); Misidentification rate: 1.0% (10 out of 960 scans); Non-identification rate: 1.8% (17 out of 960 scans); Image quality score accuracy: 95.3%; Image quality score error rate: 4.7%; Block region identification accuracy: 95.3%; Weighted Kappa coefficient for quality score: 0.77-0.98 across block regions; Positive Percentage Agreement (PPA): 61.5%-100.0%; Negative Percentage Agreement (NPA): 88.9%-100.0%; AI-assisted highlighting reduced perceived risk of adverse events in 61.67% of cases; AI reduced risk of block failure in 66.36%
